title: Meta Launches Muse Spark AI Model
summary: Meta introduces Muse Spark, its first new AI model since overhauling its AI efforts. The model is now live on the Meta AI app and website in the US.
body:
Meta Superintelligence Labs has announced the launch of Muse Spark, its first AI model since Mark Zuckerberg's significant investment in the company's AI division. This new model is currently powering the Meta AI app and the Meta AI website in the US. 

 The introduction of Muse Spark marks a significant milestone for Meta's AI efforts, demonstrating the company's commitment to advancing its AI capabilities. As the model begins to roll out across various platforms, including WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger, users can expect to see enhanced AI-driven features and improvements in their overall experience. 

 As Meta continues to expand the reach of Muse Spark, the industry can expect a shift in the AI landscape. With Meta's significant resources and influence, the impact of Muse Spark on the market and user behavior will be closely watched. The coming weeks will reveal more about the model's capabilities and how it will integrate with Meta's suite of services.
twitterThread: 🚀 Meta is back in the AI game with Muse Spark! 🤖
Here's why this matters: Meta's billions of users will soon experience AI-driven features like never before. The rollout starts with the Meta AI app and website in the US.
The wild part: Muse Spark will be integrated into WhatsApp, Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger in the coming weeks. Let that sink in.
This changes everything for Meta's competitors. The AI race just got a lot more interesting.
What's next for AI? With Meta's influence, we can expect significant advancements in the field. Buckle up!
standaloneTweet: Meta just launched Muse Spark, its first new AI model since overhauling its AI efforts! This means billions of users will soon experience AI like never before. https://ainformed.dev/articles/meta-launches-muse-spark-ai-model
